welcome.title: Welcome to SawahSense
welcome.body: A quick 60-second tour of the tools that help you keep your paddy healthy. You can skip anytime.

fields.title: Your fields
fields.body: Every field you manage lives here, sorted by health status — colour-coded so you can spot trouble at a glance.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.body: When NDVI drops, water stress builds, or growth slows, you'll see it here first — turn each alert into an action.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body: Plan your week. Tasks created from alerts show up here so nothing slips through.

pakTani.title: Pak Tani
pakTani.body: Your AI farming advisor. Ask anything about your selected field and get advice grounded in its real data.

indices.title: Vegetation indices
indices.body: Three satellite indices tell you how your paddy is doing. NDVI shows greenness — healthy plants reflect more near-infrared light. EVI is a sharper view of canopy health, especially when crops are dense. LSWI tracks water content — your warning sign when the field is drying out. Tap any to switch the map overlay and see the colour scale.

language.title: Language
language.body: Switch between Bahasa Melayu and English at any time.

replay.title: Replay anytime
replay.body: Tap this button whenever you want to see the tour again. Selamat berkebun!
